title: Household Labour Force Survey sources and methods: 2016 | Stats NZ
content:
## Household Labour Force Survey sources and methods: 2016
06 April 2017, 10:45am
This 2016 paper provides a technical description of the sample design for the Household Labour Force Survey (HLFS) .
It covers technical details on other aspects of the survey, including collection methodology, estimation and imputation methodology, and coding and processing details (from the June 2016 quarter).
It updates the Household Labour Force Survey sources and methods: 2015 to incorporate changes made from the June 2016 quarter, including the introduction of a new questionnaire.
- Household Labour Force Survey sources and methods: 2016 Adobe Acrobat PDF file, 1.5 MB
